name: Tec-9 | 贾姆比亚
descriptionEn: An ideal pistol for the Terrorist on the move, the Tec-9 is lethal in close quarters and features a high magazine capacity. It has been hand painted and laser-etched with middle eastern patterns. Shahrazad told 1000 tales... this is the last one you'll hear
descriptionZh: 一把T进行机动作战的理想手枪，Tec-9 可以在近距离造成致命伤害，且弹匣容量较高。 这把武器使用中东图案进行了手绘和激光蚀刻。 山鲁佐德讲了 1000 个故事…… 而这将会是你听到的最后一个
